segments.original_text: そして何か入れ替わってる

segments.text: This is Town and City - the platform structure makes recovery tough!
segments.original_text: これはただ村町は上が高いステージまだ飛びません

segments.text: Both players are completely even now!
segments.original_text: さあ両者完全に5分というような状況です

segments.text: Platforms are gone - now their true fundamentals are on display!
segments.original_text: 台もなくなってお互いの実力が試される

segments.text: That nair is hitting sourspot, but with proper inward DI...
segments.original_text: 空Nは根本当てですがしっかりと内側ベク変することによって

segments.text: He escaped that fair, but there's no second escape!
segments.original_text: 空前から逃れましたが2回目はないですね

full_text: And things are turning around! This is Town and City - the platform structure makes recovery tough! Both players are completely even now! Platforms are gone - now their true fundamentals are on display! That nair is hitting sourspot, but with proper inward DI... He escaped that fair, but there's no second escape!

corrections.original: 空中ニュートラルは本当てですが
corrections.rule: move abbreviation + 根本当て (base hit)
